name: Support usage limits policy example
answer:
Standard-plan customers can make up to 100 API requests per minute.
Support increases the limit after reviewing every account.
Quorum automatically raises every account's limit after one support request.

sources.title: Support Usage Limits Policy
sources.content:
Standard-plan customers can make up to 100 API requests per minute.
Requests above the limit are throttled until the next minute.
Support may increase the limit after reviewing the account.
